overview: A Dream11-style fantasy sports platform where users create teams, join contests, track live scores and win real money prizes across cricket, football and kabaddi.
features: Fantasy team creation with player budget and captain/vice-captain selection
Contest discovery and joining across cricket, football, and kabaddi
Real-time live scoring via sports data API polling
Live leaderboards with rank tracking during matches
Real-money wallet with Stripe payment integration
Contest history with winnings and prize tracking
